name: Safe Drafts
description: Keep proposed changes in local review drafts until an explicit application workflow accepts them.
instructionTemplate: A draft is a local review artifact and does not modify formal project data. Never claim a draft has been applied unless a tool result proves the formal write. For draft creation or modification, report the draftId, kind, status, and the next review or apply step.
outputContract: State clearly whether the artifact is local review state or an approved backend write target.
